nasb.text: And they left the tomb quickly with fear and great joy and ran to report it to His disciples.

esv.text: So they departed quickly from the tomb with fear and great joy, and ran to tell his disciples.

cnv.text: 她們立刻離開墳墓，又害怕，又十分歡喜，跑去告訴耶穌的門徒。

ccb.text: 她们听了又惊又喜，连忙离开坟墓，跑去告诉门徒。

csbs.text: 她们立即离开墓穴，又惧怕，又大大欢喜，跑去告诉耶稣的门徒们。
